description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent attached garage and a covered front porch. The facade features multiple symmetrically arranged windows with visible framing, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small set of steps and decorative columns. The house has a flat roof with clean, modern lines and a rectangular footprint, with a recessed section on one side. The exterior walls are smooth and uniform, likely finished in painted stucco or siding. The garage door is wide and paneled, and the front porch area includes a row of small decorative elements, possibly planters or lights. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, attached garage, and symmetrical window arrangement. The facade features a covered porch with columns and a wide garage door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch with columns, wide garage door, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the recessed section and the side wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with multiple windows and the overall rectangular shape of the house.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side entrance area, additional windows, and the extension of the porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, covered porch, and decorative columns.
